transcript: Finally some good news for AD carries, Infinity Edge and a few more crit items just got some really nice buffs. Look how many people are very happy about the Infinity Edge changes. So for Infinity Edge, it hasn't been that great since the item rework and it just got a pretty damn cool buff. You know how apart from AD and crit, it also increases the crit damage you do? Well that got increased from 40% bonus crit damage to 50% bonus crit damage. So when you buy Infinity Edge, instead of now doing 215% damage with crits, you will do 225%, which is quite noticeable. It's going to be very useful on ED carries like Jhin or Draven, but also on the wind bros Yasuo and Yone of course. Apart from that, Lord Dominic's Regards got more armor pen, from 30% to 35%, Mortal Reminder got the same buff, armor pen from 30% to 35%, and Navori Quickblade is now built differently, with a BF sword and it gives 5 more AD, from 60 to 65, but at the same gold cost. All of those items are at the same gold cost, so 3 buffs for AD carries and the Wind Ross. Well, Yone is getting his second legendary skin, so what did you expect? So, what do you think? Will this be enough to make ad carries not the least popular role now, or will this just make Yone and Yasuo even more annoying than they already are? Leave a like or I'll nerf your nose, and thanks for watching.
